title: Mastering Recursion
description: A comprehensive guide to understanding and mastering recursion for coding interviews
author: Rishu Kumar

sections.title: Fundamentals of Recursion
sections.description: Learn the basics of recursion, base cases, and how the call stack works

sections.title: Types of Recursion
sections.description: Explore direct, indirect, tail, head, tree, and mutual recursion

sections.title: Recursion with Numbers
sections.description: Solve number problems: factorial, fibonacci, power, GCD, and more

sections.title: Recursion with Strings
sections.description: Master string manipulation: reverse, palindrome, permutations

sections.title: Recursion with Arrays
sections.description: Array operations: search, sort, and divide-and-conquer algorithms

sections.title: Recursion with Data Structures
sections.description: Apply recursion to linked lists, trees, and graphs
